name: SKYX Platforms Corp.
business: SKYX Platforms Corp. develops and sells plug-and-play and smart home technologies, including light fixtures, ceiling fans, and an all-in-one Smart Sky Platform. The company also operates an e-commerce business through its acquisition of Belami, an online retailer of home lighting and furnishings. Its products are designed for residential and commercial buildings to enhance safety and smart capabilities.

exposures.sentence: The Smart Sky Platform is connected through WIFI and BLE, includes numerous smart and safety features, including a smart smoke detector, a smart carbon monoxide detector, time scheduling, temperature sensor, humidity sensor, WIFI extender, energy saving-eco mode, high quality speakers, and a back-up battery that can power back-up internet and an emergency light, as well as dimming, night light, light color changing and more.

On April 28, 2023, we completed our acquisition (the Closing ) of all of the issued and outstanding shares of Belami, an online retailer and e-commerce provider specializing in home lighting, ceiling fans, and other home furnishings.

Our first- and second-generation technologies enable light fixtures, ceiling fans and other electrically wired products to be installed safely and plugged into a ceiling s electrical outlet box within seconds, and without the need to touch hazardous wires.

We implement advanced cybersecurity measures and protocols to ensure that our software, technologies, servers, products, platform, and devices are all protected to prevent any type of unauthorized or illegal access or interference to our software, technologies, servers, products, platforms, and devices.

catalysts.sentence: we expect additional products, including the third-generation smart-advanced platform to be available in 2026.
We expect to begin providing such services in 2026 but cannot provide any assurance that we will be able to do so.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market in the United States exceeds $500 billion
tamClaims.sentence: We believe our total addressable market in the United States exceeds $500 billion, based on the Company's internal calculations derived from the estimation of the total target user pool, projected average selling price, and projected units per household.

tamClaims.claim: Billions of installations of light and other electrical fixtures globally
tamClaims.sentence: We believe there are billions of installations of light and other electrical fixtures globally.
